subagents.finding: Recommended a conservative exact-name carry-forward slice for names with one existing normalized pair and no same-name normalized conflicts. Expected missing unit-family 586 -> 515.

implemented_changes.change: Added exact-name missing-unit inference for Pauli's carry-forward slice across count, complaint, money, ridership, workforce, safety, safety-rate, and engagement metric names.
guards: Rules apply only when payload.unit and payload.unit_normalized are absent.
Rules require a finite numeric value, except money-range records may use finite value_min and value_max.
Complaint rows require count-shaped evidence rather than percent-only rows.

Known ambiguous/conflict clusters remain unresolved: train_derailments, train_collisions, crash_injuries, Secondary Screening Score, audit_projects_completed, monthly_ridership, lost_time_injury_rate, major_felony_change, total_revenue, vacancies, subway_fires, and robbery.

remaining.next_lane: Read-only Codex subagent Avicenna (019f206b-8437-7912-bf46-3fbcdafa5b01) is auditing the remaining tail for another exact-name slice while avoiding known conflict clusters.
